title: Seeing the Dentist 牙疼看牙

lines.en: Which tooth is it? Show me, please.
This one on the left. It hurts when I eat.
lines.zh: 左边这颗。吃东西的时候特别疼。

lines.en: Open your mouth wide, please. Let me take a look.
You have a small hole in this tooth. It is a cavity.
lines.zh: 你这颗牙上有个小洞。是蛀牙。

lines.en: Oh no! Do I need to get it fixed?
Yes. Do not worry, it will not hurt. I will be gentle.
lines.zh: 需要。别担心，不会疼的。我会很轻的。

lines.en: How can I stop it from happening again?
Brush your teeth twice a day and eat less candy.
